basic_details.job_title: NIT Uttarakhand Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) or Project Associate (PAT-I)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand (NIT Uttarakhand) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) or Project Associate (PAT-I) Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website of National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Uttarakhand Junior Research Fellow (JRF) or Project Associate (PAT-I) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E. / M.Tech. / M.S Or B.E. / B.Tech.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.E. / M.Tech. / M.S. (Engg.) or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering / Geotechnical Engineering / Rock Mechanics / Engineering Geology and allied areas with minimum of 1st class (or 60% marks / 6.75 CGPA if class not specified) at UG (B.E. / B.Tech.) & PG levels, and GATE qualified in Civil Engineering. Project Associate (PAT-I): B.E. / B.Tech. qualified in Civil Engineering and allied areas with minimum of 1st class (or 60% marks / 6.75 CGPA if class not specified). Desirable GATE paper: Civil Engineering.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- pm + 9% HRA (JRF); Rs. 31,000/- pm + 9% HRA (PAT-I GATE); Rs. 25,000/- pm + 9% HRA (PAT-I non-GATE)
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- pm + 9% HRA Project Associate (PAT-I) (GATE Qualified): Rs. 31,000/- pm + 9% HRA Project Associate (PAT-I) (Non-GATE): Rs. 25,000/- pm + 9% HRA

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by NIT Uttarakhand?
faq.answer: NIT Uttarakhand has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the posts of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) or Project Associate (PAT-I).

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 04 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: For the JRF post, candidates need to have an M.E. / M.Tech. / M.S. (Engg.) or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering / Geotechnical Engineering / Rock Mechanics / Engineering Geology and allied areas, with GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) or Project Associate (PAT-I) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the JRF post is Rs. 37,000/- per month plus 9% HRA.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand, Srinagar Garhwal, Uttarakhand - 246174.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
